$comment: Canonical backlog of action items only the founder can complete. Agents append/remove via commits to this file; scripts/sync_founder_actions.mjs renders the current state to #founder-actions in Slack. Delete an item to mark it done.

items.title: Rotate STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
items.why: Secret was pasted in chat during Stripe setup on 2026-04-22. Must be rotated before the key is used in a committed Edge Function deploy.
items.where: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys → Roll secret key

items.title: Rotate SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
items.why: Service-role JWT was pasted in chat on 2026-04-22. It grants full RLS bypass; rotate before it lands in any committed env file or deploy.
items.where: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API → Reset service_role key

items.title: Review + merge PR #7 — kill critical CVE + Sentry DSN hygiene
items.why: Removes the last unused Firebase dep (protobufjs RCE GHSA-h755-8qp9-cq85) and drops the hardcoded Sentry DSN fallback. npm audit goes from 9 vulns → 0.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/7

items.title: Review + merge PR #8 — first real CI gate
items.why: Adds lint+build, Python guardrails smoke test, and npm audit fail-on-high across every PR and push. Main stops being on the honor system.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/8

items.title: Review + merge PR #9 — delete 9 dead .js re-export shims
items.why: Cosmetic close-out. Build/lint green, bundle unchanged (already tree-shaken), repo easier to reason about.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/9

items.title: Generate Stripe price_id for Snippd Pro ($4.99/mo)
items.why: Edge Function Checkout Session path needs a concrete Price ID. Payment Link fast-path works without it today, but the robust path (with metadata + email pre-fill) is blocked until this exists.
items.where: Stripe Dashboard → Products → Snippd Pro → Pricing → Add price → copy price_…

items.title: Deploy supabase/functions/create-checkout-session
items.why: Upgrades the /pro page from Payment Link redirect to a proper Checkout Session. Requires price_id (above) + STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (rotate first) set as Edge Function secrets.
items.where: Supabase Dashboard → Edge Functions → Deploy from this repo

items.title: Confirm Sentry → Slack alert rule is active
items.why: You confirmed earlier that the rule fired on a test issue; this is just a periodic re-check. If it stops firing the entire self-healing loop goes dark.
items.where: Sentry → Alerts → Rules → 'Slack #engineering-alerts on new Issue'

items.title: Verify SLACK_WINS_WEBHOOK_URL is set as repo secret
items.why: The .github/workflows/wins.yml action will silently skip if this secret is missing, so celebration posts would stop and nobody would notice.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/settings/secrets/actions

items.title: Create #founder-actions channel + add SLACK_ACTIONS_WEBHOOK_URL as repo secret
items.why: This backlog can only post to Slack once the webhook exists. Also needed as a GitHub secret so the auto-sync workflow can run on PR events.
items.where: Slack → Create channel #founder-actions → Apps → Incoming Webhooks → Add → copy URL → paste into .env.local AND https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/settings/secrets/actions as SLACK_ACTIONS_WEBHOOK_URL

items.title: Create #reports channel + add SLACK_REPORTS_WEBHOOK_URL as repo secret
items.why: The 6x-daily @Reporter heartbeat (.github/workflows/reports-cron.yml from PR #12) silently skips when the webhook is missing. You won't get any 1am/5am/9am/11am/3pm/8pm ET posts until the secret is set.
items.where: Slack → Create channel #reports → Apps → Incoming Webhooks → Add → copy URL → paste into .env.local AND https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/settings/secrets/actions as SLACK_REPORTS_WEBHOOK_URL

items.title: Review + merge PR #11 — stop wins.yml failure-email spam
items.why: wins.yml has a broken job-level if: expression that makes every branch push report 'workflow file issue' — 5 failed-run emails since yesterday. PR #11 removes the gate; the script's own graceful-skip handles the missing-webhook case.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/11

items.title: Review + merge PR #12 — #reports heartbeat cron
items.why: Ships the generator + 6x-daily cron. Blocked on nothing; posts will start flowing as soon as the #reports channel + SLACK_REPORTS_WEBHOOK_URL secret exist (tracked as repo-secret-reports-webhook above).
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/12

items.title: Review + merge PR #13 — Apple-Reviewer audit pipeline
items.why: Ships the weekly App Store review audit (17 guideline checks + Slack heartbeat). Current verdict on main: REJECT, 4 blockers. The pipeline catches the specific blockers below before they get caught by a real reviewer.
items.where: https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/pull/13

items.title: Live-test /pro Payment Link end-to-end
items.why: Confirm the redirect to buy.stripe.com/… succeeds, payment clears, and Sentry breadcrumb 'stripe: Redirecting via Payment Link' appears on the user's session replay.
items.where: https://snippd.app/pro (or local dev) → click upgrade → Stripe-hosted page → test card if in test mode

items.title: Update index.html <title> from 'snippd-beta-demo' to 'Snippd'
items.why: Browser tab still says the scaffold name. Fixes Apple review guidelines 2.1 + 2.3.1 in one line change. Escalated to high because it blocks App Store submission.
items.where: c:/Users/godki/snippd-beta-demo/index.html

items.title: Build in-app account deletion flow
items.why: Apple guideline 5.1.1(v): required since June 2022. No in-app delete path exists today; email-only deletion gets rejected. Needs a Settings route + destructive confirm + Edge Function calling auth.admin.deleteUser with cascade.
items.where: Settings screen + Supabase Edge Function + cascade-delete SQL triggers

items.title: Add /privacy and /terms routes + footer links
items.why: Apple guidelines 5.1.1(i) + 5.6 and App Store Connect both require a reachable privacy policy + terms. Closes two review blockers at once. Must disclose Sentry error collection + session replay.
items.where: New src/PrivacyPolicy.jsx + src/TermsOfService.jsx routes; same URL in App Store Connect privacy field.

items.title: Decide IAP strategy for iOS: StoreKit vs External Link entitlement
items.why: Apple guideline 3.1.1: Stripe subscription for digital features = iOS reject. Before the iOS wrapper ships, pick: (a) Apple IAP via StoreKit with platform-gated payment UI (recommended — keep Stripe on web), or (b) apply for External Link Account Entitlement (uncertain, slow). Affects architecture of the /pro flow.
items.where: Strategic decision — then implementation on a wrapper branch (Capacitor or React Native).

items.title: Decide bundle-size strategy (738 kB / 228 kB gz triggers Vite warning)
items.why: Not urgent — mobile 4G load is still <2s gz — but the audit flagged it. Options: route-level code-split (easy), lazy-load Sentry replay (medium), or just bump chunkSizeWarningLimit and move on.
items.where: Decision to make; implementation belongs to @Lead-Architect once chosen.
